column1: BROKER TIER BENEFITS — what we offer Gold / Silver brokers
Per latest whiteboard. Tier 1 = Gold (125 brokers), Tier 2 = Silver (125 brokers). Edit any cell in the matrix below as policy evolves.

column5: Top monetary differentiator. Communicate as 'OH Tier 1 / Tier 2 brokerage premium'.
Faster payout cycle. ATS = Agreement to Sell, usually 30 days before registry. Tier 1 gets 2× the early payout of Tier 2.
OH reimburses portal listing fees (99acres / MagicBricks / Housing.com) for OH inventory the broker posts. Removes the ₹3K–10K/month broker cost barrier.
CRM access, branded marketing collateral (brochures, reels, photo packs), lead-routing software, regular training sessions, performance dashboards.
Both tiers get advance notice of new OH inventory before public listing on portals. Differentiator: Tier 1 can be given 48h window vs Tier 2 24h — currently set equal per whiteboard.

column3: Not on the latest whiteboard. Likely reserved for OH's own buyer-relationship managers.
